mapper.insert: insert into agents (agent_id, agent_type, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, site_id, site_name, region, zone, status, capabilities_json, current_task_count, reserved_task_count, max_concurrent_tasks, health_score, capability_profile_json, runtime_load_json, plugin_name, plugin_version, capability_revision, available_slots, capacity_utilization, outbox_pending, outbox_in_flight, recovery_pending_assignments, draining, connected_at, last_heartbeat_at, disconnected_at, lease_expires_at, runtime_backoff_until, runtime_backoff_reason, runtime_failure_count, updated_at) values (#{agent.agentId}, #{agent.agentType}, #{agent.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{agent.agentSessionId}, #{agent.siteId}, #{agent.siteName}, #{agent.region}, #{agent.zone}, #{agent.status}, coalesce(cast(#{agent.capabilitiesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb), #{agent.currentTaskCount}, #{agent.reservedTaskCount}, #{agent.maxConcurrentTasks}, #{agent.healthScore}, coalesce(cast(#{agent.capabilityProfileJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), coalesce(cast(#{agent.runtimeLoadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{agent.pluginName}, #{agent.pluginVersion}, #{agent.capabilityRevision}, #{agent.availableSlots}, #{agent.capacityUtilization}, #{agent.outboxPending}, #{agent.outboxInFlight}, #{agent.recoveryPendingAssignments}, #{agent.draining}, #{agent.connectedAt}, #{agent.lastHeartbeatAt}, #{agent.disconnectedAt}, #{agent.leaseExpiresAt}, #{agent.runtimeBackoffUntil}, #{agent.runtimeBackoffReason}, #{agent.runtimeFailureCount}, now()) on conflict (agent_id) do update set agent_type = excluded.agent_type, owner_gateway_node_id = excluded.owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id = excluded.agent_session_id, site_id = excluded.site_id, site_name = excluded.site_name, region = excluded.region, zone = excluded.zone, status = excluded.status, capabilities_json = excluded.capabilities_json, current_task_count = excluded.current_task_count, reserved_task_count = agents.reserved_task_count, max_concurrent_tasks = excluded.max_concurrent_tasks, health_score = excluded.health_score, capability_profile_json = excluded.capability_profile_json, runtime_load_json = excluded.runtime_load_json, plugin_name = excluded.plugin_name, plugin_version = excluded.plugin_version, capability_revision = excluded.capability_revision, available_slots = excluded.available_slots, capacity_utilization = excluded.capacity_utilization, outbox_pending = excluded.outbox_pending, outbox_in_flight = excluded.outbox_in_flight, recovery_pending_assignments = excluded.recovery_pending_assignments, draining = excluded.draining, connected_at = excluded.connected_at, last_heartbeat_at = excluded.last_heartbeat_at, disconnected_at = excluded.disconnected_at, lease_expires_at = excluded.lease_expires_at, runtime_backoff_until = excluded.runtime_backoff_until, runtime_backoff_reason = excluded.runtime_backoff_reason, runtime_failure_count = excluded.runtime_failure_count, updated_at = now()
mapper.update: update agents set status = #{status}, last_heartbeat_at = now(), updated_at = now() where agent_id = #{agentId}

update agents set reserved_task_count = reserved_task_count + 1, status = case when current_task_count + reserved_task_count + 1 >= max_concurrent_tasks then 'BUSY' else 'BUSY_ACCEPTING' end, updated_at = now() where agent_id = #{agentId} and status in ('CONNECTED','IDLE','BUSY_ACCEPTING','BUSY') and coalesce(draining,false) = false and (runtime_backoff_until is null or runtime_backoff_until <= now()) and (available_slots > 0 or current_task_count + reserved_task_count < max_concurrent_tasks)

update agents set reserved_task_count = greatest(0, reserved_task_count - 1), status = case when status in ('OFFLINE','EXPIRED','ERROR','DRAINING') then status when current_task_count + greatest(0, reserved_task_count - 1) <= 0 then 'IDLE' when current_task_count + greatest(0, reserved_task_count - 1) < max_concurrent_tasks then 'BUSY_ACCEPTING' else 'BUSY' end, updated_at = now() where agent_id = #{agentId} and reserved_task_count > 0

update agents set status = #{status}, disconnected_at = #{disconnectedAt}, last_heartbeat_at = #{disconnectedAt}, updated_at = now() where owner_gateway_node_id = #{gatewayNodeId} and status not in ('OFFLINE','EXPIRED')

update agents set status = 'EXPIRED', disconnected_at = #{now}, last_heartbeat_at = #{now}, updated_at = now() where lease_expires_at is not null and lease_expires_at < #{now} and status not in ('OFFLINE','EXPIRED')
